name: Tomato Purée
intro: This is simply a thin purée of tomatoes used in many curries for flavour and colour. Here are two ways you can make it.
method: Mix 1 part concentrated tomato paste with 3 parts water.
Blend a 400g tin (2 cups) of plum tomatoes to a smooth purée. Add a little concentrated tomato paste if you want a deeper red colour.
NOTE: You could also use sieved, unseasoned Italian passata.
